tasks.name: Set up GitHub repo + project scaffold
tasks.comments: Use FastAPI cookiecutter or manual scaffold. Include .env, requirements.txt, Dockerfile stub.

tasks.name: Provision Supabase project + create DB schema
tasks.comments: Create assets, lineage, findings tables. Save DDL to /db/schema.sql in repo.

tasks.name: Build FastAPI app skeleton + folder structure
tasks.comments: Folders: /api, /models, /services, /agents, /tests. Wire up CORS + health check endpoint.

tasks.name: Implement POST /upload-assets endpoint
tasks.comments: Accept CSV or JSON. Validate required fields (name, type, domain). Upsert into assets table.

tasks.name: Implement POST /upload-lineage endpoint
tasks.comments: Accept source/target pairs. Store confidence_score default 1.0 if not provided.

tasks.name: Build Collibra CSV export parser
tasks.comments: Map Collibra export column headers to internal schema. Handle missing fields gracefully.

tasks.name: Implement GET /health-score endpoint
tasks.comments: Score = 100 - (5*High + 3*Med + 1*Low). Return score + breakdown by severity.

tasks.name: Implement GET /issues endpoint
tasks.comments: Paginated. Filter by severity, status, domain. Sort by severity desc by default.

tasks.name: Implement GET /summary stub endpoint
tasks.comments: Return placeholder summary text for now. Claude API wired in Week 3.

tasks.name: Seed DB with synthetic Collibra test data
tasks.comments: Create 50 assets, 30 lineage pairs, intentional gaps: missing owners, stale assets, broken lineage.

tasks.name: Build rules engine core + severity scoring
tasks.comments: 6 rules: missing owner, blank description, stale >180d, no steward on critical, disconnected lineage, duplicate names.

tasks.name: Build Metadata Curator Agent
tasks.comments: Detects: missing descriptions, duplicates, stale assets, wrong ownership, unused assets. Returns findings list.

tasks.name: Build Lineage Guardian Agent (NetworkX)
tasks.comments: Load lineage into NetworkX DiGraph. Detect: broken paths, orphan nodes, disconnected clusters, low-confidence zones.

tasks.name: Build Governance Gap Agent
tasks.comments: Runs AFTER W2-T2 and W2-T3. Checks: every CDE has owner, every KPI has lineage, PII classified, critical assets stewarded.

tasks.name: Build agent orchestration layer
tasks.comments: Metadata Curator + Lineage Guardian run in parallel (asyncio). Governance Gap runs after both complete. Executive Risk runs last.

tasks.name: Build Executive Risk Agent (aggregator)
tasks.comments: Aggregates all findings. Computes health score, audit readiness score, top risks, priority action list.

tasks.name: Write unit tests for all 6 rules
tasks.comments: Use pytest. Test each rule with both passing and failing asset fixtures. Aim for 90% coverage on rules engine.

tasks.name: Integration test: full agent pipeline end-to-end
tasks.comments: Run all 4 agents against synthetic DB. Validate findings count, score calculation, ordering.

tasks.name: Integrate Claude API — SDK setup + auth
tasks.comments: Install anthropic SDK. Store API key in .env. Create /services/claude_client.py wrapper.

tasks.name: Build executive summary prompt + response parser
tasks.comments: Input: findings counts by severity + top issues. Output: 3-paragraph executive summary + top 3 actions.

tasks.name: Build steward guidance prompt
tasks.comments: Per-asset fix suggestions. Quick wins vs complex fixes. Owner assignment recommendations.

tasks.name: Build trend analysis prompt
tasks.comments: Compare current vs previous scan. Identify improving vs degrading domains. Highlight repeated issue patterns.

tasks.name: Wire AI outputs into GET /summary endpoint
tasks.comments: Cache AI responses per scan run (don't re-call Claude on every GET). Store in findings table or separate summaries table.

tasks.name: Build email report template + GitHub Actions scheduler
tasks.comments: Weekly digest email via SendGrid or Resend. GitHub Actions cron: 0 8 * * 1 (Monday 8am). Include health score + top 3 risks.

tasks.name: QA AI outputs against synthetic test data
tasks.comments: Validate summary quality, hallucination check, tone consistency. Tune prompts as needed.

tasks.name: Set up Next.js project + Tailwind + Vercel
tasks.comments: npx create-next-app. Configure Tailwind. Connect to Vercel for auto-deploy from main branch.

tasks.name: Pick startup name + buy domain
tasks.comments: Options: CatalogPulse, MetaGuardian, TrustLine AI, GovernOps. Check .ai and .com availability.

tasks.name: Build Overview page (health score + sparklines)
tasks.comments: Recharts gauge for health score. Sparklines for score trend. Top risks summary cards. Last scan timestamp.

tasks.name: Build Issues page (filterable findings table)
tasks.comments: Filter by: severity, agent, domain, status. Sort columns. Inline status update (Open → In Progress → Resolved).

tasks.name: Build Lineage Health page (graph viz)
tasks.comments: Use react-force-graph or vis-network. Highlight broken nodes in red. Click node to see asset details.

tasks.name: Build Recommendations page (AI priority actions)
tasks.comments: Render Claude-generated executive summary + per-action cards. Quick win vs complex fix badges.

tasks.name: Build landing page with upload CTA
tasks.comments: Headline: Your Collibra is installed. We make it work. CTA: Upload export → free health report in 24h. Pilot pricing callout.

tasks.name: Prepare demo dataset (synthetic Collibra export)
tasks.comments: Polish synthetic data for demos. Realistic asset names, domains, owners. Pre-compute findings for demo mode.

tasks.name: Deploy to Vercel staging + smoke test
tasks.comments: Verify all pages load. Test API connectivity from Vercel to FastAPI. Check env vars in Vercel dashboard.

tasks.name: End-to-end QA + bug fix pass
tasks.comments: Full user journey: upload CSV → view dashboard → read AI summary → see recommendations. Fix any blockers.
